features.name: dffsr cell with constant zero set and active reset
features.description: Code should include a DFFSR (D flip-flop with set/reset) cell type where the set input is tied to constant 0 while reset is actively connected
features.snippet:
cell $_DFFSR_PPP_ $auto$simplemap.cc:467:simplemap_dffsr$58
  connect \C \clk
  connect \D \d
  connect \Q \q
  connect \R \arst
  connect \S 1'0
end

features.name: dffsr cell type with async reset polarity
features.description: Code should include an ILANG cell representation of a D flip-flop with asynchronous set and reset where both polarities are active-high (PPP suffix)
features.snippet:
cell $_DFFSR_PPP_ $auto$simplemap.cc:467:simplemap_dffsr$58
  connect \C \clk
  connect \D \d
  connect \Q \q
  connect \R \arst
  connect \S 1'0
end
